# /test-plan

> Produce `test-plan/` for the feature. Reporting suite categories: data-accuracy (sample-row verification), refresh (window + duration), RLS (each role gets the right slice), accessibility (WCAG AA), performance (visual render time), multilingual (when in scope).

## Usage

```
/test-plan [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Execution flow

1. Group FRs into test suites by report / dataset / dashboard.
2. Generate index + per-suite files with categories:
   - **Data accuracy** — reconciliation against authoritative source
   - **Refresh** — duration ≤ target; partition slice verified
   - **RLS** — login as each role, confirm visible rows are correct
   - **OLS** — confirm hidden columns are absent / blocked from visuals
   - **Accessibility** — WCAG AA contrast, screen-reader navigation, keyboard tabs
   - **Performance** — visual render times across 95th-percentile dataset slices
   - **Multilingual** — locale switch + numeric / date formatting
3. Inline self-check + doc_lint.
4. `currentStates += TEST_PLAN_DRAFT`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/reporting/features/{f}/test-plan/index.md`
- `projects/{p}/reporting/features/{f}/test-plan/{suite}.suite.md`
